sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64770" key="malakia/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰλᾰκ-ιάω</orth>, <sense id="n64770.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">become soft</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῶν βοῶν, ἂν εἰς τὰς χηλὰς μαλακιῶσι, προσαλείφειν τὰ ἄκρα τῶν κεράτων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.559f</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> codd. (fort. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μαλκίωσι</foreign>); <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">μαλκίω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
